task_completion.description: Construct interior partition walls and doors to create a 'Secure Vault' and an 'Appraisal Office'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D floor plan or 3D view for new interior walls dividing the space, with at least 3 doors (visible as door swing arcs on the 2D plan or actual doors in 3D) creating enclosed spaces.

task_completion.description: Define and name at least four distinct room zones: 'Auction Floor', 'Gallery', 'Vault', and 'Office'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels on the 2D floor plan explicitly naming the rooms: 'Auction Floor', 'Gallery', 'Vault', and 'Office'. The rooms should have distinct floor areas defined.

task_completion.description: Furnish the 'Auction Floor' with an auctioneer's podium or desk and at least 20 chairs or benches facing it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dense arrangement of seating (at least 20 chairs or benches) oriented towards a single desk or podium in the area designated as the Auction Floor.

task_completion.description: Place at least 8 display or storage units distributed between the 'Gallery' and 'Vault'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count cabinets, shelving units, or display tables in the areas labeled Gallery and Vault. There should be a combined total of at least 8 units.

task_completion.description: Set up administrative areas with at least 2 desks and 4 chairs for registration and appraisal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for office setups (at least 2 desks and 4 chairs) placed in the Office or registration areas, distinct from the main auction seating.

task_completion.description: Add at least 5 decorative or lighting items from the built-in catalog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for plants, lamps, paintings, sculptures, or similar decorative items in the 3D view or the item list pane. There must be at least 5 such items.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to construct the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application interface being actively used to place walls and furniture, rather than terminal windows or text editors modifying the .sh3d file directly.

integrity.description: The agent worked on the provided starter file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Sweet Home 3D window title or file context should indicate that 'auction_house_starter.sh3d' is open.

integrity.description: The furniture and walls are placed in a physically plausible manner.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 2D plan and 3D view show a reasonable spatial distribution of walls, rooms, and furniture. Items should not be glitched, stacked on top of each other at the exact same coordinates, or placed outside the building shell.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses Sweet Home 3D with the starter file 'auction_house_starter.sh3d'. The final layout must contain at least 4 interior walls and 3 doors. There must be at least 4 defined rooms named 'Auction Floor', 'Gallery', 'Vault', and 'Office'. Furniture requirements: at least 24 chairs total (20 for auction, 4 for admin), at least 3 desks total (1 for auction, 2 for admin), at least 8 storage/display units (in Gallery/Vault), and at least 5 decor/lighting items.
